symbols.name: LOG_LEVELS
symbols.snippet: const LOG_LEVELS = { debug: 0, info: 1, warn: 2, error: 3 };

symbols.name: Logger
symbols.snippet: export class Logger { constructor(level = 'info') { this.level = LOG_LEVELS[level] ?? LOG_LEVELS.info;

symbols.name: debug
symbols.snippet: debug(message, context = {}) { this._log('debug', message, context); }

symbols.name: info
symbols.snippet: info(message, context = {}) { this._log('info', message, context); }

symbols.name: warn
symbols.snippet: warn(message, context = {}) { this._log('warn', message, context); }

symbols.name: error
symbols.snippet: error(message, context = {}) { this._log('error', message, context); }

symbols.name: _log
symbols.snippet: _log(level, message, context) { if (LOG_LEVELS[level] < this.level) return; const entry = { timestamp: new Date().toISOString(), level, message, ...context };

symbols.name: createLogger
symbols.snippet: export const createLogger = (level) => new Logger(level);
